question: Show the name and total hours of renting for each vehicle.
sql: SELECT Vehicles.name, SUM(Renting_history.total_hours) AS total_hours_of_renting FROM Vehicles JOIN Renting_history ON Vehicles.id = Renting_history.vehicles_id GROUP BY Vehicles.id;

back_translation.intent: 计算每辆车的总租赁时长

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求显示每辆车的名称和总租赁时长，SQL描述通过SUM(Renting_history.total_hours)聚合函数和Vehicles.id分组实现该需求，且列选择和表关联关系正确。
